long_description:
[TEL] NGDC count in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar no output records is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_host_qradar_agent_troubleshooting.html
TIP Short Description: us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-rias some hosts running NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar agents have had no output records for the past hour
TIP Situation: NGDC count in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar no output records
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-rias::

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    count by (agent_tag_cluster) (increase(fluentbit_output_proc_records_total{name="out_syslog_all", program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/qradar/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster!=""}[1h]) < 1) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-rias'

Time:             12/03/2025 12:16 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179364733%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [TEL] NGDC count in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar no output records
Description:  count of NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar agents running on hosts belonging to a specific cluster that have had no output records for the past hour
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   count by (agent_tag_cluster) (increase(fluentbit_output_proc_records_total{name="out_syslog_all", program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/qradar/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster!=""}[1h]) < 1) > 0
Duration: 1 m
